name: Weathered/Natural Finish Statement LP Round Outdoor Fire Table Natural - Threshold™: Patio Heater, Lava Rocks Included
description:
Enjoy lasting conversations fireside by using the Weathered/Natural Finish Statement LP Round Outdoor Fire Table from Threshold™. This round fire table includes lava rock to help you ignite the fire, a cover for coverage when in use and a control knob to help adjust the flame. It comes with a side-opening door to manage the lava rock, and burns with propane or liquid petroleum gas. Designed in a natural weathered finish, this fire table is both heat and weather resistant, and requires one AAA alkaline battery.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
